parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Attachment ID.

get.summary: Get the Macro document id for an email attachment, uploading it if it doesn't already exist.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Attachment ID.

get.summary: Get any active backfill job for the user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID.

get.summary: List all contacts belonging to the user, grouped by link.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of scheduled messages to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of scheduled messages to return.

put.summary: Schedule or update a scheduled draft.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the draft message to schedule

delete.summary: Remove the scheduled send from a draft.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The ID of the draft

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Draft ID.

post.summary: Add an attachment to a draft.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the draft to add the attachment to.

delete.summary: Remove an attachment from a draft.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the draft to remove the attachment from.

parameters.name: attachment_id
parameters.description: The ID of the attachment to remove.

post.summary: Initialize email functionality for the user. Populates initial threads and enables inbox syncing.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Label ID.

get.summary: List all links belonging to the user.

parameters.name: include_signature
parameters.description: If the user's gmail signature should be included in the response. Defaults to false.

patch.summary: Add or remove a label from a batch of messages

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Message ID.

get.summary: Get paginated thread previews with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit for pagination. Default is 20. Max is 500.

parameters.name: sort_method
parameters.description: Sort method. Options are viewed_at, created_at, updated_at, viewed_updated. Defaults to viewed_updated.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: View type. Supported values: inbox, sent, drafts, starred, all, important, other, user:<label>

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor value. Base64 encoded timestamp and item id, separated by |.

get.summary: Get a thread with a paginated number of messages.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Thread ID.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for message pagination. Default is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit for message pagination. Default is 5.

patch.summary: Change the archived status of a thread.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Thread ID

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter messages after this date

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit number of messages returned

post.summary: Called by FE when the user has seen a thread.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Thread ID.

calendar_invite.description: if any email contains a calendar invite

generic_sender.description: if any sender in the thread is a generic email

known_sender.description: if user has previously emailed any sender in the thread

tabular.description: if any email contains a <table> html tag

APIThread.description: Thread object exposed to the FE in Get Threads Call

AccessLevel.description: Ordered from least to most access top -> bottom

AddDraftAttachmentRequest.description: The request passed to send a message

file_name.description: The name of the file being uploaded.

sha.description: The SHA256 hash of the file being uploaded.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

attachment_id.description: The ID of the attachment in the database.

content_type.description: The MIME type of the attachment.

upload_url.description: The URL to upload the attachment to.

ApiSortMethod.description: common types of sorts based on timestamps

Attachment.description: Attachments of a message, as sent to us by the provider.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft message this attachment belongs to.

file_name.description: Original file name of the attachment.

s3_key.description: S3 object key where the attachment content is stored.

sha.description: SHA-256 hash of the file content for integrity verification.

AttachmentMacro.description:
Attachments of a message created when sending a message/draft through Macro FE. references
a macro item (document, canvas, etc). These don't actually get sent to the provider when
sending a message, but we store them so we can display the pills for the Macro objects in the FE
when displaying the message.

AttachmentToSend.description: The attachment data we need to include when sending a message to a provider.

CreateDraftRequest.description: The request passed to send a message

CreateLabelResponse.description: The response returned from the create label endpoint

EmptyResponse.description: Empty response is required due to custom fetch forcing `response.json()`

ErrorResponse.description:
A plain old json error response for use with axum.
yup, thats it.

GetActiveBackfillJobResponse.description: The response returned from the get backfill job endpoint

GetAttachmentDocumentIDResponse.description: The response returned from the get attachment endpoint

GetAttachmentResponse.description: The response returned from the get attachment endpoint

GetBackfillJobResponse.description: The response returned from the get backfill job endpoint

GetPreviewsCursorParams.description: Parameters for getting thread previews with cursor-based pagination.

limit.description: Limit for pagination. Default is 20. Max is 500.

oneOf.description: Sort method. Options are viewed_at, created_at, updated_at, viewed_updated. Defaults to viewed_updated.

GetThreadResponse.description: The response returned from the get thread endpoint

ListLinksResponse.description: The response returned from the list links endpoint

attachments_draft.description: Uploaded file attachments for the message, if it is a draft

global_id.description:
The globally unique Message-ID header value created by the sender to uniquely identify this email
Used for threading across all providers (In-Reply-To header, References header)

PreviewView.description: View type. Supported values include standard labels and a custom user label user:<label>

SendMessageRequest.description: The request passed to send a message

ThreadPreviewCursor.description: thread summary returned in preview cursor endpoint

send_time.description: The time to send the message (ISO 8601 format)
